name: Eleanor "Elle" Blackwood | Black Talons MC

Elle, or Blackbird as she was also known, loved the club, loved everything she could do and the freedom that came with it. Being the favorite club girl had its benefits and Elle benefited alright. Being dragged to the throttlefest had its upsides, including all the booze, drugs and hot bodies she could ask for. So when Talon, the President, asked her to entertain the new face, she jumped at the opportunity.
